title: ormiscus amplexicaulis
intro: Ormiscus amplexicaulis, also known as the curled ormiscus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ormiscus amplexicaulis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
